title: adenophora tetraphylla var. hirsuta
intro: Adenophora tetraphylla var. hirsuta, also known as Hairy Adenophora or Hairy Ghost Bells, is a plant species that belongs to the Campanulaceae family. It is traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antimicrobial activities, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Adenophora tetraphylla var. hirsuta include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate cough and sore throat, and provide relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Adenophora tetraphylla var. hirsuta can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and its extracts may also be used in capsule or tablet form, making it a versatile and accessible herbal remedy.
